title: ervum tetraspermum subsp. tenuissimum
intro: Ervum tetraspermum subsp. tenuissimum, also known as thin-stemmed Lupin, is a plant species in the legume family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and diabetes, and may also support digestive health. Ervum tetraspermum subsp. tenuissimum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
